text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hishiama! I didn't know you were coming too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Air Groove! Yeah. I saw Sweep's interview
on TV the other day. It really took me back...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, to when the two of us saw her off before
her debut.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh... I remember that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But what a peculiar coincidence this is. I never
expected the two of us would be watching her run
in the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Come to think of it, I suppose you and I were
both voted to run in Grand Prix races, only for
first place to elude us.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, exactly. That's why I figured if the course
of history's about to change, I wanna witness the
moment it does with my own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh... How funny. So do I.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Right... Show me what you can do, my sweet little
Sweepy. I've been waiting such a long time for
this day.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: ...Oh no, that won't do.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: I don't want to blink and miss a single second of this... And I certainly don't want my vision blurry either.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy took the top spot in the fan vote for the
Takarazuka Kinen. I didn't even get into the top
twenty.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But am I shocked or upset? Nooope! I was just
thinking that nothing's changed.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Everything's just as lame as it's always been!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I bet there are a bunch of people here who think
the race is too long for me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
They probably think that someone from the Triple
Tiara tour couldn't possibly beat someone from
the Triple Crown tour in a medium-distance race,
and a senior-year one to boot.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What a bunch of dummies!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh, Rob Roy. There you are.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes, here I am. And I've become the hero... as I
said I would.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Haha, yeah... Now you're really worth beating!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna win today. I mean, there are just too
many dummies in this lame world.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna watch, right, Familiar?! Blink and
you'll be sorry!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Keep your eyes locked on me the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
'Cause I'm about to change the world with my
magic!
